mano_cua.result_summary: 使用逗号键(keyCode 188)添加标签时，标签内容被截断最后一个字符：输入 test@example.com 按逗号后标签变成 test@example.co（丢失'm'）。通过手动输入和 DevTools dispatchEvent 两种方式均复现。原因是代码中 addTag(currentTag.substring(0, currentTag.length - 1)) 多截了一个字符。输入框在添加后被清空（正常），无逗号残留。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: CRITICAL BUG CONFIRMED: tag content is 'test@example.co' (missing final 'm'). The last character is consistently dropped when comma key creates a tag. Input IS cleared after tag creation (no comma residue). Bug reproduced via both manual typing and DevTools keydown dispatch.
